brief.objective: explain the PRIME instructional materials correlation process
keyMessages: WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal.
PRIME 2020 includes materials aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition.
WIDA PRIME information helps educators consider how particular materials fit in their program.
proofPoints: The WIDA PRIME site lists reviewed PRIME v1 and v2 correlations and PRIME 2020 alignments.
The WIDA PRIME site says PRIME 2020 includes materials aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition.
The WIDA PRIME site says WIDA does not endorse instructional materials and PRIME is not an evaluative tool that judges effectiveness.
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a single-column HTML email announcement with a logo header, concise message, one CTA button, and inline styles.

headlineOptions: Explore WIDA PRIME correlations and alignments
Clear information for instructional materials decisions
subheadOptions: WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal. Source language distinguishes PRIME V1.
WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal.
WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal.
copy.body: WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal. For publishers, this draft focuses on PRIME 2020, PRIME V1/V2, Spanish Language Development correlations, and publisher workflow. The WIDA PRIME site lists reviewed PRIME v1 and v2.
bullets: WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal.
PRIME 2020 includes materials aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition.
WIDA PRIME information helps educators consider how particular materials fit in their program.
The WIDA PRIME site lists reviewed PRIME v1 and v2 correlations and PRIME 2020 alignments.
The WIDA PRIME site says PRIME 2020 includes materials aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition.
copy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

WIDA PRIME information helps educators consider how particular materials fit in their.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: email-safe headline with concise body text
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: wide hero art strip with controlled crop
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: email body stack with 2 proof rows

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?

safeZones: Create a wide art field that crops cleanly at email width.
Keep the canvas simple enough for a narrow email module.
Avoid tiny details that disappear at email width.
exactTextPriority: WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME
PRIME 2020 includes materials aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards
WIDA PRIME information helps educators consider how particular materials fit in their program.
appOwnedElements: Official WIDA PRIME logo from approved asset.
Deterministic grid, typography, headline, audience, and CTA.
Exact support copy and proof hierarchy.
Final export wrapper, source evidence, and review state.
imageGenOwnedElements: Atmosphere, photography or illustration treatment, color, texture, and crop rhythm.
No document layout, fake cards, panels, contact bars, charts, or text.

imagePrompts:
CONTRACT=campaign-art-plate-v5
MODE=campaign-art-plate
INTENT={out:html-email-announcement, brand:WIDA PRIME, aud:publishers, theme:[prime | 2020 | spanish | language | development | correlations | publisher | workflow | publishers], tone:polished, publisher-facing, precise, ground:strict}
CANVAS=1200x700, email-safe full-bleed header canvas
FORMAT=email-safe campaign art plate; not a print flyer or full webpage.
BRAND={pal:[#0057A8 | #00A6A6 | #6CC24A | #F6A800], visual:[instructional materials | curriculum review | standards alignment | publisher workflow | Montserrat], evid_ids:[wida-prime-2020 | wida-prime-materials]}
BRAND_BOUNDARY={keep:[instructional materials | PRIME process | PRIME 2020 | PRIME V1 | PRIME V2 | Spanish Language Development]; avoid_sibling:[WIDA Workshops | workshops and webinars | sole source provider | CARE Coaching | CCNA | CALL | WebbAlign | DOK]; parent_context:[WIDA | WCEPS]}
BRAND_VISUAL_PROFILE={show:[K-12 content-area instructional materials | teacher editions and student workbooks | curriculum binders and grade-band packets | standards alignment review | publisher and correlator workflow]; props:[science, math, language arts, and social studies | instructional material sample spreads without readable | alignment review notes without labels | publisher review table | grade-band curriculum packets]; avoid:[random novels | trade books | library stacks | fake book titles | fake publisher brands | fake PRIME seals | endorsement imagery]; app_owned:[WIDA PRIME logo | verified seal or badge only if present | headline | CTA | proof copy]; tone:[publisher-facing | standards-aligned | clean | material-specific | trustworthy]; fit:wide instructional-materials hero strip with standards-alignment context}
LOGO=do not render any WIDA PRIME logo, wordmark, brand initials, logo-like mark, chevron/mountain mark, arrow mark, or background logo pattern; app renders official logo once.
MARKS_RULE=official logos, seals, badges, CTAs, headlines, labels, and readable copy are app-owned; do not invent or render them in the art plate.
OWN=app:[Official WIDA PRIME logo from approved asset. | Deterministic grid, typography, headline, audience, and CTA. | Exact support copy and proof hierarchy. | Final export wrapper, source evidence, and review state.]; imagegen:[Text-free full-bleed campaign art plate. | Atmosphere, photography or illustration treatment, color | No document layout, fake cards, panels, contact bars, charts].
CROP_SAFE=[Create a wide art field that crops cleanly at email width. | Keep the canvas simple enough for a narrow email module. | Avoid tiny details that disappear at email width.]
MESSAGE_CUES=[headline_theme:prime/2020/spanish | audience:10 chars | cta_intent:start/prime/process | proof_volume:compact]; mood/subject only, never words/layout.
REFS=none; references only.
USER_NOTE=Do not imply WIDA endorses materials or that PRIME evaluates effectiveness.
ART=wide email-safe campaign art plate with refined education-sector atmosphere and no email UI; NY media/ad-agency quality, premium atmosphere, layered depth, non-generic education storytelling, intentional crop.
VISUAL_STYLE=authentic editorial photography or refined abstract-illustrative atmosphere; avoid posed training-room stock, washed-out empty fades, generic meeting-table cliches, literal brand-shape wallpaper.
COMPOSITION=app owns layout, typography, text, logos, proof points, CTA, and export; ImageGen creates only the art plate.
TEXT_RULE=absolutely no readable text, letters, numbers, labels, fake paragraphs, book titles, publisher names, email addresses, URLs, phone numbers, citations, or lorem ipsum.
NO=document layouts, panels, blank boxes, placeholder modules, mock UI, cards, fake text, fake charts, icons with labels, contact bars, duplicate logos, fake logos, fake seals, fake badges, fake book titles, fake publisher brands, logo-like marks, wordmarks, chevrons, arrows, mountain logos, malformed UI, brochure scaffolding, invented claims, endorsement imagery, close-up faces, detailed hands, stock-photo workshop posing.
QUALITY=best over fast; polished full-bleed campaign art plate, no template scaffolding.

request.goal: explain the PRIME instructional materials correlation process
request.topic: PRIME 2020, PRIME V1/V2, Spanish Language Development correlations, and publisher workflow
request.notes: Do not imply WIDA endorses materials or that PRIME evaluates effectiveness.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: WIDA is pleased to list instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal.
sourceEvidence.label: Instructional materials listing

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Users may filter for correlations previously correlated with PRIME V1 and PRIME V2, or aligned with PRIME 2020.
sourceEvidence.label: PRIME versions

sourceEvidence.excerpt: PRIME 2020 includes materials that are aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition.
sourceEvidence.label: PRIME 2020

sourceEvidence.excerpt: WIDA does not endorse any set of instructional materials. WIDA PRIME is not an evaluative tool that judges the effectiveness of published materials.
sourceEvidence.label: Endorsement guardrail
